sql: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE status LIKE #{statusWildcard} AND id IN (#{ids})
templateSql:
<bind name="statusWildcard" value="'\'' + status + '%'"/>
SELECT id, name FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status LIKE #{statusWildcard}
    </if>
    <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">
        AND id IN
        <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
